summary: The user is planning a summer party and seeks refreshing cocktail ideas that incorporate fresh lime juice. They recently learned to make a classic Daiquiri in a mixology class and are considering a DIY cocktail bar with various mixers and garnishes for guests to create their own drinks. The user also plans to serve small bites and is interested in pairing drinks with a Paella dish.
facts: The user learned how to make a classic Daiquiri using fresh lime juice and simple syrup in a mixology class. The user is planning a summer party and wants to serve refreshing cocktails. The user is considering making Paella for the party, which includes smoky chorizo and saffron. The user plans to set up a DIY cocktail bar with various mixers and garnishes for guests. The user intends to add flavored simple syrups, like strawberry and mint, to the cocktail bar. The user made cucumber-infused gin recently and plans to use it in a Cucumber Lime Refresher cocktail. The user is excited to try cocktail recipes that include fresh lime juice. The user is considering serving small bites alongside the cocktails at the party.
